title: The Big Cheese Ultra Power Ready-Baited Mouse Trap Kit, Kills Mice, Ready-To-Use, Easy Disposal, Lockable and Secure Plastic Bait Station, Indoor or Outdoor Use, White
features: SECURE: Lockable trap station, can be used as bait box
ALL-IN-ONE-KIT: Ready-to-use, contains pre-baited Ultra Power mouse trap
TESTED AND PROVEN: On-pack guarantee provided
POWERFUL: Performance tested to ensure effective control of mice – just like the traps that professionals use
ONE-TOUCH SETTING: Just one touch is needed to set the mouse traps, Captured mice are easily disposed of with a simple click

REFILLABLE: The plastic is easy to clean for re-use, It is recommended that to maintain effectiveness, the traps bait well should be re-filled with The Big Cheese Mouse and Rat Attractant (STV163, sold separately), Alternatively, the station can also be used as a bait station with The Big Cheese Block Bait Rodent Killer (STV567, sold separately)
INDOOR OR OUTDOOR USE: Suitable for use in the home or outdoors in garages, garden sheds or outbuildings, Safe for use in child and pet play areas
description: From the manufacturer GUARANTEED EFFECTIVE RODENT CONTROL Bait & Kill: Our Ultra Power range offers the only true single-feed rodent poison available on the amateur market. The highly palatable formula contains a powerful active ingredient that delivers a lethal dose to rodents in just one feed. Catch & Kill: We offer a selection of versatile rodent trap solutions that are highly effective, with satisfaction guaranteed. Our powerful snap traps have been designed with durability in mind to be used again and again, whilst our innovative electronic products use smart-circuit technology to deliver a quick and humane kill. Pet-safe and child-safe options are available. Catch Alive: Safe for use around children and pets, these traps provide a humane, welfare-friendly alternative to lethal methods. Our professional-quality traps have been designed with safety in mind, both for the user and the target pest. Self-setting multi-catch mechanisms and fast-action closures allow for efficient rodent trapping and are ideal for large rodent infestations. Repel: 24/7 protection and peace of mind - our advanced mega-sonic repellers will protect your home around the clock, ridding your home of rodent pests and preventing their return. Poison-free and safe for use around children. Pack contains 1 ready-baited Ultra Power mouse trap GUARANTEED RODENT CONTROL Our on-pack pledge is "satisfaction guaranteed" reassuring you that the high-performance Ultra Power products from The Big Cheese will deliver effective results every time! The Big Cheese Ultra Power range delivers home-use rodent control solutions that are guaranteed effective - JUST LIKE THE PROFESSIONALS USE. Professional-quality products you can trust. Experts in rodent control for over 25 years. Ultra Power Mouse Trap Kit from The Big Cheese Secure, lockable trap station. Ultra Power Trap Kits from The Big Cheese are an effective and proven method of controlling rodent infestations indoors and out, without exposing children, pets, and non-target animals to the risk of accidental contact with traps. This kit is equipped with an easy-to-set Ultra Power Mouse Trap – just like the professionals use – which is ready-baited and reusable. The kit is lockable and tamper resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. Protects children and pets from trap. Includes pre-baited Ultra Power mouse trap. Indoor and outdoor use. Can be used as a bait box. Bait block fixings included. Replenish trap with The Big Cheese Fresh 'n Tasty Rat & Mouse Attractant purchased separately. Part of the ULTRA POWER range. Lockable and tamper-resistant station Ultra Power Mouse Trap Kit from The Big Cheese can be used either with the trap included or any Ultra Power baits for safe application of rodenticide baits, both indoors and out. Baits are available in a variety of formats (sold separately). Remember to read all bait labelling instructions and warnings. Open the station with the key attached to the underside of the station. Remove red bait cover and set trap by pulling down bar until you hear a click. Close the lid and site station where appropriate. CAUTION: When in use, keep the key in a safe place away from the station. Remember to wash hands after use. Child and pet safe For protection of children and pets place the set trap inside the lockable and tamper-resistant station. The station will not only prevent accidental traps but also keep captured rodents hidden from sight. High performance trap Ultra Power Mouse Trap Kit from The Big Cheese contains a powerful high performance trap – just like the traps the professionals use that has been tested to ensure effective control of mice delivering an instant humane kill. TRAPPING TIPS Block entry holes and target potential sources of rodent infestation such as garages and garden sheds. Remove other food sources from the treatment area. Store foodstuffs securely and practice good hygiene to avoid further infestations. Baited ready to use Ultra Power Mouse Traps are baited ready to use. Simply remove the bait cover and set the trap by squeezing handle until you hear a click. For protection of children and pets place the trap inside bait station securing closed with the key. To increase catch rates, re-bait traps with The Big Cheese Fresh 'n Tasty Mouse and Rat Attractant (purchase separately). Guaranteed effective rodent control Mice Mice are a highly adaptive and invasive species and they’re able to populate a variety of ecosystems. Agricultural fields, buildings, and boats are all viable habitats. In more temperate climates there will be even more possible nest sites. Swimming, climbing, jumping proficiency, and the two incisors on their upper jaw, all make for a formidable predator wherever they reside. However, despite all of these amazing abilities, the house mouse chooses to reside, as its name would indicate, in a home. House mice ( Mus Musculus Domesticus ) are a highly adaptive member of the genus Mus (mouse), yet for some reason they choose to live in the least demanding environment, a human home. They are attracted by the continuous flow of food and warmth, ideal for nest sites. The offer of food and shelter is so tempting that many choose to stay and breed year-round. Diet As one can imagine, the palate of a house mouse is highly adaptable since every habitat they migrate through will hold different opportunities for feeding. Outside dwellers will eat insects and a lot of grain, however, inside dwelling mice are practically omnivorous and, just like brown rats, will consume 10-15% of their body weight each day in just about anything we throw away. Most house mice will nibble on multiple different food sources to obtain their required nutrition, up to 20 times each night, since they’re nocturnal. A large proportion of a mouse’s 3g daily intake will be grain, namely cereal, favouring high-energy, man-made foods. Studies have proven that the levels of aggression in both rats and mice can be attributed to this high fat ‘human’ diet they have both been on for so long. These foods increase oestrogen levels and results in a shorter temper and longer periods of aggression. Evidence of intrusion 3-6 mm long droppings, black and rod-shaped. Approximately 80 per day, often appearing in clusters. Spotted in various places including attics, storage boxes, floorboards, disused cupboards. Check around fridges, ovens, heating units and washing machines too. Check wood, paper, cables, carpet and furniture for marks. Dark grey marks on surfaces from oil on hair. Although they don’t sweat, they emit a musky odour and urinate a lot, producing an ammonia smell. Hearing pattering feet in walls at night could be a sign of a mouse or rat infestation. If your dog is barking at night at what seems to be nothing, it could be picking up the scent or sounds of rodents.
